a:r.a:t: Marketing Studio allows launch of multi-channel campaigns with content draft help
Daily reporting of aged settlement fails and pending transfer activity to support reserve calculation and operational oversight
Identifies settlement issues requiring attention and supports SEC Rule 15c3-3 reserve computation
Our aged fail and transfer reporting runs daily on the Ascend platform, identifying fails to deliver/receive that exceed aging thresholds and tracking pending transfer activity
Ongoing monitoring of options positions and trading activity against OCC-established thresholds for concentration and risk limits
Helps manage options clearing risk and ensures compliance with position and exercise limits
Our OCC threshold monitoring operates continuously on both Classic and Ascend platforms, tracking options positions against established limits
